notes: Reproduced as reported. Win32 NuGet package grew from ~13 MB to ~82 MB due to native PDB files (libSkiaSharp.pdb, ~80-84 MB per architecture) being included in 3.119.2. Linux packages grew from ~40 MB to ~54 MB because .so files are no longer stripped (contain debug_info). macOS is unaffected. Root cause is PR #3374 which set IncludeSymbols=true for all NativeAssets projects without setting SymbolPackageFormat=snupkg. Not fixed on main — NativeAssets.Build.targets unchanged since the regression commit.

reproductionSteps.command: unzip -q win32-3.119.1.nupkg -d win32-3.119.1 && unzip -q win32-3.119.2.nupkg -d win32-3.119.2 && find win32-3.119.2/runtimes -type f -name '*.pdb'

3.119.2 runtimes (DLLs + PDBs, 280 MB total):

3.119.2 linux-musl-x64/native/libSkiaSharp.so: with debug_info, not stripped (18,024 KB)

macos-3.119.2.nupkg: 6,984 KB

versionResults.notes: Win32 package 13,804 KB with only DLL files. Linux .so files stripped. No debug symbols in packages.
Win32 package 82,460 KB — includes libSkiaSharp.pdb (~80-84 MB per arch). Linux package 54,300 KB — .so files not stripped with debug_info. 497% increase on Win32, 36% increase on Linux.
Win32 package 81,964 KB — PDB files still present. Issue not fixed in latest preview.
NativeAssets.Build.targets unchanged since regression commit 6a7a452af. IncludeSymbols=true without SymbolPackageFormat=snupkg still present.

actionability.reason: Confirmed packaging regression from PR #3374. Debug symbols included in main NuGet packages across Win32 and Linux. Not fixed on main or latest preview. Needs a fix to either set SymbolPackageFormat=snupkg or exclude debug symbols from the NativeAssetPackageFile globs.

actions.description: Add area/Build and os/Linux labels to reflect packaging regression affecting Win32 and Linux
Link to PR #3374 which introduced the regression

proposedResponse.body:
Thanks for reporting this — we've confirmed the size increase.

**Root cause:** PR #3374 ("Preserve and pack the Android symbols") expanded `IncludeSymbols=true` to all `NativeAssets` projects without setting `SymbolPackageFormat=snupkg`. This causes native debug symbols to be bundled in the main `.nupkg` instead of a separate symbols package.

**Findings:**

| Package | 3.119.1 | 3.119.2 | Cause |
|---------|---------|---------|-------|
| Win32 | 13 MB | 82 MB | `libSkiaSharp.pdb` (~80-84 MB per arch) included |
| Linux | 40 MB | 54 MB | `.so` files not stripped (contain `debug_info`) |
| macOS | 7 MB | 7 MB | Unaffected |

The issue also persists in `3.119.3-preview.1.1` and on the `main` branch.

**Workaround (from @Jack251970):** Add MSBuild targets to delete PDB files from the `runtimes/` folder after build/publish:

```xml
<Target Name="RemoveNativePdbs" AfterTargets="Build">
  <ItemGroup>
    <PdbFilesToRemove Include="$(OutputPath)runtimes\**\*.pdb" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Delete Files="@(PdbFilesToRemove)" />
</Target>
```

workarounds: Add MSBuild target to delete runtimes/**/*.pdb files after build/publish (workaround from Jack251970 in issue comments)
